htmlText.1002: [chars]
matches any one of the characters inside the brackets
A[BCD]E matches …ldquo;ACE…rdquo;, but not …ldquo;AFE…rdquo; or …ldquo;AB…rdquo;
matches any single character that is not inside the brackets
[^ABC]D matches …ldquo;FD…rdquo; or …ldquo;ZD…rdquo;, but not …ldquo;AD…rdquo; or …ldquo;CD…rdquo;
[char-char]

cREVTable.currentview:
A[B-D] matches …#147;AB…#148; or …#147;AC…#148;, but not …#147;AG…#148;

[A-Za-z0-9] matches any alphanumeric character

htmlText.1002: matches any single character (except a linefeed)
A.C matches …ldquo;ABC…rdquo; or …ldquo;AGC…rdquo;, but not …ldquo;AC…rdquo; or …ldquo;ABDC…rdquo;
matches the following character at the beginning of the string
matches the preceding character at the end of a string
matches zero or more occurrences of the preceding character or pattern
matches one or more occurrences of the preceding character or pattern
matches zero or one occurrences of the preceding character or pattern

cREVTable.currentview:
ZA?B matches …#147;ZB…#148; or …#147;ZAB…#148;, but not …#147;ZAAB…#148;

[A-D]+G matches …#147;AG…#148; or …#147;CAG…#148;, but not …#147;G…#148; or …#147;AB…#148;

htmlText.1002: matches either the pattern before or the pattern after the |.
causes the following character to be matched literally, even if it has special meaning in a regular expression

A\.C matches …ldquo;A.C…rdquo;, but not …ldquo;A\.C…rdquo; or …ldquo;ABC…rdquo;

\\ matches …ldquo;\…rdquo;
